div.label: 📁 Step 1 : Select Project

div.p: Click on any card below to get started

div.div: Share your progress with AI sentiment analysis

button.name: action_quick_standup
action_quick_meeting
action_quick_announcement
action_quick_live

div.style: text-align: center; margin-top: 24px; padding-top: 20px; border-top: 1px solid #177BEB;

div.div: How it works : Select your project, then click on any action card. The communication channel is automatically created and managed for you.
